title: Aldri annet enn bråk
actors: Turid Haaland, Stig Egede-Nissen, Vigdis Røising
plot: The Bråten family lives on the top floor in a sublet appartment in the suburbs of Oslo. The father, mother and 5 kids all share the space of this 1 room and a kitchen appartment. The father is mostly silent, except for when he scr...
